note: Indicative IR calendar based on Ferrovial's historical reporting cadence (FY ~late Feb, Q1 ~early May, H1 ~late Jul, 9M ~late Oct/early Nov; AGM ~April). Dates are ESTIMATES — confirm on Ferrovial's IR site. The live /api/calendar overlays Yahoo's next earnings date.
cadence: Quarterly trading updates + half-year and full-year results. Reg FD / MAR quiet periods precede each release.

events.title: JFK New Terminal One — Phase A opening (targeted)
Project dividends window (Managed Lanes & 407 ETR, year-end)

reportingNotes: Ferrovial files with the SEC as a Foreign Private Issuer: 20-F (annual) and 6-K (events/quarterly).
Also reports to Spain's CNMV and the Dutch AFM under MAR (hechos relevantes).
Quiet period: no comment on the business in the run-up to results.
